title: torder -noautostop
body:
Wondering why **torder -noautostop** sorts cells where 
cell $techmap\inst_m0.$memwr$\mem$memory_test.v:87$24
is above
cell $techmap\inst_m0.$procmux$35 
instead of
cell $techmap\inst_m0.$memrd$\mem$memory_test.v:84$23

Please run with

```
read_verilog memory_test.v
hierarchy -top memtest04

proc; opt; flatten; proc; opt; pmuxtree; opt; clean;
torder -noautostop

show
shell
```

[memory_test.v.zip](https://github.com/cliffordwolf/yosys/files/463364/memory_test.v.zip)
code_blocks:
read_verilog memory_test.v
hierarchy -top memtest04

proc; opt; flatten; proc; opt; pmuxtree; opt; clean;
torder -noautostop

show
shell
